default.text: ⟦⟦ Õṽẽr̃ãl̃l̃,̃ t̃h̃ẽ c̃h̃ãr̃t̃ ẽm̃p̃h̃ãs̃ĩz̃ẽs̃ c̃õñs̃ĩs̃t̃ẽñt̃ c̃õñt̃r̃õl̃ ãñd̃ p̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñ ãw̃ãr̃ẽñẽs̃s̃. ⟧⟧

control_focused.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ĩs̃ c̃h̃ãr̃t̃ f̃ãṽõr̃s̃ s̃t̃ẽãd̃ỹ c̃õñt̃r̃õl̃ õṽẽr̃ s̃h̃õr̃t̃ b̃ũr̃s̃t̃s̃ õf̃ s̃p̃ẽẽd̃. ⟧⟧

rhythm_driven.text: ⟦⟦ M̃ãĩñt̃ãĩñĩñg̃ ã s̃t̃ãb̃l̃ẽ r̃h̃ỹt̃h̃m̃ ĩs̃ c̃ẽñt̃r̃ãl̃ t̃h̃r̃õũg̃h̃õũt̃ t̃h̃ẽ c̃h̃ãr̃t̃. ⟧⟧

pressure_building.text: ⟦⟦ P̃r̃ẽs̃s̃ũr̃ẽ g̃r̃ãd̃ũãl̃l̃ỹ b̃ũĩl̃d̃s̃ ãs̃ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃ p̃r̃õg̃r̃ẽs̃s̃. ⟧⟧

endurance_weighted.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ õṽẽr̃ãl̃l̃ s̃t̃r̃ũc̃t̃ũr̃ẽ p̃l̃ãc̃ẽs̃ m̃õr̃ẽ w̃ẽĩg̃h̃t̃ õñ ẽñd̃ũr̃ãñc̃ẽ t̃h̃ãñ p̃ẽãk̃ s̃p̃ẽẽd̃. ⟧⟧
